basic_details.job_title: IIA UDC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for Upper Division Clerk Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Astrophysics (IIA), Bengaluru, an autonomous academic national institution under the Department of Science & Technology, Government of India, has released an official advertisement for Upper Division Clerk (UDC) positions.

important_dates.written test / skill test date: Will be communicated via registered email to shortlisted candidates

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: Not exceeding 27 years as on the closing date for submission of online application. Age relaxation applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates as per Government of India norms. | Pension: All appointees will be governed by the National Pension System (NPS) as notified by the Government of India. | Posting: Selected candidates are liable to be posted anywhere in India and at any of the Institute's field stations and locations.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications and parameters specified by IIA: | Essential Qualification: A Bachelor's degree from a recognized University/Institution with knowledge of use of personal computer and its applications (MS Office). | Handling matters of Establishment, Administration, Stores & Purchase, and Accounts & Finance. Performing any other duties as assigned by the Controlling Officer / Reporting Officer from time to time.

salary_details.details: Essential administrative details regarding the vacancy package include:

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete the online application process:
Visit the official IIA recruitment portal: https://www.iiap.res.in/iia_jobs/ and register by entering your name and email address.
Log in using your registered username and password to fill the online application form.

Upload scanned copies of: recent photograph, date of birth certificate, educational qualification certificates, degree certificate(s), experience certificate(s), valid caste certificate (if applicable), and Curriculum Vitae (CV) — all in a single scanned PDF file.
Ensure all uploaded documents are clearly visible and readable. Incomplete applications or those without requisite attachments will be summarily rejected.
Take a printout of the submitted application form and retain it for future reference.

Government employees (Central/State Govt./Autonomous/PSU) must additionally forward their application through proper channel — send the forwarding letter with a copy of the online application and self-attested supporting documents within 30 days from the closing date to:
The Administrative Officer, Indian Institute of Astrophysics, Department of Science and Technology, Sarjapura Road, 2nd Block, Koramangala, Bengaluru – 560 034
Superscribe the envelope: "Application for the post of …………… forwarding through proper channel"

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIA UDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 29 June 2026 up to 05:30 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IIA UDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 5 vacancies are available for Upper Division Clerk posts (UR-02, OBC-02, SC-01).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for IIA Upper Division Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: The salary is Level-04 pay scale ranging from ₹25,500 to ₹81,100 as per the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for IIA UDC posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Bachelor’s degree and knowledge of computer applications, including MS Office.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for IIA UDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 27 years as on the closing date, with relaxation for reserved categories as per Government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for IIA UDC 2026?
faq.answer: Selection includes screening of applications, a written test (covering English, reasoning, GA, accounts, and rules), and a qualifying skill test.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the IIA UDC exam be conducted?
faq.answer: The written test and skill test will be conducted in Bengaluru only.

faq.question: Q8. Is the IIA UDC post permanent?
faq.answer: Yes, it is a regular post with a probation period of 2 years under the National Pension System (NPS).

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for IIA UDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through the official IIA website at iiap.res.in by registering and submitting the application form.

faq.question: Q10. What are the job responsibilities of an IIA Upper Division Clerk?
faq.answer: The role includes handling administration, establishment, accounts, finance, stores, and procurement-related work.
